regions.content: Large fixed doll with equipped layers and short Essence hints
Hair, main, bottom, shoes and accent icons
Large cropped garment thumbnails with strong selected state
Single saturated primary CTA after both focus slots are filled
Album, mute and reset kept visually subordinate
Flash, signature silhouette, VFX and audience crown
Two focus pieces and discovered pair
Six discovered cards or unknown silhouettes
Best player-authored look for each recipe

layout_notes.portrait: Avatar occupies the upper 55-65%; categories and a scrollable closet stay below; AWAKEN remains thumb-reachable.
layout_notes.landscape: Avatar and runway occupy the left/center 55-65%; closet is a right rail; AWAKEN is visually isolated.
layout_notes.orientation_change: Preserve outfit, focus selection, recipe, reveal state and progress across reflow.
